examples.name: Basic Gross Margin Analysis
examples.description: Analyze gross margin variance by region

examples.name: Multi-Dimensional Drill-Down
examples.description: Drill down to terminal level for revenue analysis

input.request: Show me top revenue drivers at the terminal level

insight_cards.title: Dallas Terminal — Strong Growth
insight_cards.insight: Revenue up 18% YoY driven by new customer acquisitions

examples.name: Cost Center Budget Variance
examples.description: Identify cost centers with largest budget overruns

input.request: What are the top 5 cost centers with budget overruns?

examples.name: Trend Analysis with Seasonality
examples.description: Analyze sales trends with seasonal baseline comparison

input.request: Analyze sales trends for the last 12 months

insight_cards.title: Seasonal Pattern Detected
insight_cards.insight: Sales consistently peak in November-December but 2024 Q4 underperformed seasonal baseline by 12%

input.request: Identify outliers in operating expenses by department

insight_cards.title: IT Department — Statistical Outlier
insight_cards.insight: IT expenses 3.2 standard deviations above mean (MAD-based detection). Recommend investigation.

examples.name: Alert-Only Focus (Skip Full Report)
examples.description: Get only critical alerts without full narrative

input.request: What are the critical issues in gross margin?

examples.name: Custom Model Override (Testing)
examples.description: Test with a different model for performance comparison

input.request: Compare West region performance to East region for Q4

insight_cards.title: Regional Performance Gap
insight_cards.insight: West region gross margin declined 8.5% while East region grew 3.2% in Q4. Primary driver: higher COGS in West.

examples.name: Time-Series Correlation
examples.description: Analyze correlation between metrics over time

input.request: Is there a correlation between gross margin and operating expenses?

insight_cards.title: Lagged Correlation Detected
insight_cards.insight: Gross margin and OpEx show -0.72 correlation with 1-month lag. When OpEx increases, gross margin tends to decline next month.

examples.name: Error Handling — Missing Dataset
examples.description: Example of error response for invalid dataset

expected_output.error: Dataset 'nonexistent_dataset' not found. Available datasets: trade_data, retail_sales, operations_costs

integration_examples.code:
from google.cloud import aiplatform

# Initialize Vertex AI
aiplatform.init(project='your-project-id', location='us-central1')

# Invoke agent
response = aiplatform.Agent('data-analyst-agent').invoke(
    input={
        'request': 'Analyze gross margin by region',
        'dataset_name': 'trade_data'
    }
)

print(response['outputs']['executive_brief_pdf'])
# Output: gs://project-outputs/executive_briefs/2024-03-12_gross_margin_region.pdf

# Using gcloud CLI
gcloud ai agents invoke data-analyst-agent \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --input='{"request": "Analyze gross margin by region", "dataset_name": "trade_data"}' \
  --format=json | jq -r '.outputs.executive_brief_pdf' | xargs gsutil cp - ./report.pdf
